intro: Between April 13 and April 20, 2026, ZCyberNews published nine articles tracking high-severity remote access trojan (RAT) activity. The threat actors Mirax and REF6598 were prominently observed during this period. Their campaigns primarily targeted the cryptocurrency and financial-services sectors, with notable impact across Europe, Latin America, Spain, and Turkey. All nine reported incidents were assessed as high severity, indicating a concentrated wave of significant RAT-based intrusions focused on critical economic infrastructure.
